title: ‘UFO, Aliens, Second Moon, Or Another Natural Phenomena?’: Video Of ‘Two Moons’ In Sky Puzzles Internet
description: A video of a woman spotting “two moons” in the night sky from her roof is going viral on social media, leaving the internet theorising about a possible “UFO or alien sighting”. Take a look...

title: JD Vance says he'll get to the bottom of UFO files. Also, he thinks aliens are demons | Watch
description: Did US VP JD Vance just claim aliens are actually “demons”? In a podcast chat, he dismissed extraterrestrials and promised to dig into UFO files before his term ends. What exactly did he say and what do official reports reveal? Scroll down to read more.

title: JD Vance Vows to Probe UFO Files, Says He Believes ‘Aliens’ Are Demons
description: US Vice President JD Vance said Friday he plans to dig deeper into government records on unidentified flying objects, adding that he believes so-called aliens may actually be “demons.” “I have not been able to spend enough time on this to really understand it, but I am going to, trust me. I’m obsessed with this,” [...] The post JD Vance Vows to Probe UFO Files, Says He Believes ‘Aliens’ Are Demons appeared first on ANC .

title: JD Vance, ‘obsessed’ with UFO files, says they're not aliens but something else — Here's what US Vice President thinks
description: Vance said UFOs weren't aliens, describing this as a Christian understanding of ‘celestial beings who fly around who do weird things to people.’

title: South Mississippi UFO identified as high-altitude balloon from New Mexico
description: On Friday, WLOX received several calls and reports of a strange object flying over Harrison County.
